report: THE REAL CONSTRAINT — THEORY OF CONSTRAINTS EXECUTION
executive_summary: One constraint governs the entire business: qualified buying traffic is functionally zero. Every downstream stage (PDP, ATC, checkout, Stripe) has capacity that is not being used. Removing any non-traffic constraint yields near-zero incremental revenue.
the_business_constraint: TRAFFIC VOLUME + TRAFFIC QUALITY (Stages 1 and 2). Every other stage has slack.

evidence_last_24h.interpretation: 95 visitors, 0 with country, 0 with UTM, 108 sessions ≈ near-1 session/visitor, 0 buying signals → dominant profile is bot/crawler traffic, not qualified humans.

stage_analysis.name: Traffic Quality
stage_analysis.evidence: 0 PDP viewers with country=US in 30d, 5 Pinterest sessions/30d

stage_analysis.name: Landing Experience
stage_analysis.failure_rate: cannot measure — no real buyer sample
stage_analysis.evidence: Land→PDP 0.67% last 24h is bot behavior, not landing failure

stage_analysis.name: Product-Market Fit
stage_analysis.evidence: 16.9% PDP→ATC on hero SKU exceeds 5–10% benchmark → fit is real when a real buyer arrives

stage_analysis.name: Pricing
stage_analysis.evidence: $268 hero converts to ATC at benchmark-beating rate

stage_analysis.name: Payment (Stripe)
stage_analysis.evidence: 16 expiries are 3 tester bursts, not organic buyers; DBA rename is a multiplier without a multiplicand today

stage_analysis.name: Fulfilment
stage_analysis.evidence: US warehouse stock (256 units on hero) verified

rejected_hypotheses: Stripe broken (as ROOT — real but downstream)
bottleneck_law_applied: Because Traffic is the bottleneck, this report does NOT recommend more checkout work, more Stripe work, more PDP polish, more trust widgets, or new dashboards. All are forbidden by the Bottleneck Law until traffic is unblocked.

the_one_recommendation.action: Trigger a maximum-safe US-targeted Pinterest publishing wave on the Automatic Cat Litter Box hero SKU today, using the already-deployed PAIP v1 / PQIF v4 / Guardian Publish Gate pipeline. No new code, no new engine — activate existing capacity.
the_one_recommendation.why: Pinterest is the only organic channel that can turn creative capacity into US clicks within 24h. SEO is 30–90d. Email needs a list. Google Ads is unavailable. TikTok has zero attributed sessions. Pinterest currently produces 5 sessions/30d against a pipeline sized for 300–1000/day — 99% of built capacity is idle.
the_one_recommendation.business_risk: LOW — uses existing Guardian gate (95% quality floor), rollback = pause the wave
the_one_recommendation.rollback: Pause pinterest_autopilot flag; existing rollback path
the_one_recommendation.business_value: Only action that changes shots-on-goal from ~5 to ~500 today

validation_plan.signal: US Pinterest sessions in canonical_events with utm_source=pinterest
validation_plan.success_metric_24h: >=200 pinterest sessions AND >=1 US PDP view

why_every_other_action_ranks_lower.Stripe DBA rename: Improves the conversion of a traffic population that does not yet exist. Multiplier × 0 = 0. Retain as owner backlog for AFTER traffic arrives.
why_every_other_action_ranks_lower.Checkout/PDP/trust polish: All stages above ATC already beat benchmarks; further polish yields diminishing returns before traffic exists.
why_every_other_action_ranks_lower.SEO investment: Correct medium-term lever, wrong today-horizon (30–90d to first click).
why_every_other_action_ranks_lower.TikTok / email / affiliates: No warm audience or list; longer setup than Pinterest.
why_every_other_action_ranks_lower.Fixing telemetry (null country/UTM/visit: High-value but does not itself create a buyer; batch with backlog.

final_ceo_answer: If we remove the qualified-traffic constraint by activating the idle Pinterest capacity on the hero SKU today, GetPawsy has the highest probability of achieving its first profitable sales. Every other engineering action is optimising the wrong bottleneck.
final_law_compliance: OK — recommends marketing action, not engineering. Willing to conclude the webshop is good enough. Willing to conclude traffic is the constraint.
